J'accepte et je m'engage à respecter les: I accept and commit to complying with OLMART's sponsorship terms. I certify that my product meets Premium e-commerce standards.
Un grand nombre de vendeurs souhaitant s: A high volume of sellers wishing to sponsor creates competition. The admin panel reviews requests manually based on the overall performance of your OLMART store.
Le vendeur s'engage à expédier rapidemen: The seller commits to shipping sponsored products promptly. An above-average Return to Origin (RTO) rate will revoke this product's priority, even if sponsored.
Toute manipulation de prix afin de tromp: Any price manipulation to deceive the algorithm will result in a permanent ban from the sponsorship program. The product must be available in local stock.
Le produit doit présenter des images de: The product must feature high-quality images, without text overlays or aggressive watermarks. The description must be accurate and complete.
Veuillez lire attentivement nos conditio: Please read our terms carefully before requesting a sponsored placement. OLMART reserves the right to approve or reject any request.
Une fois actif, le sponsoring reste en p: Once active, the sponsorship remains in place. However, if your order rejection or Return to Origin (RTO) rate increases, the admin team may revoke access to protect the shopping experience.
L'équipe examine la qualité de vos visue: The team reviews the quality of your visuals and descriptions. Adherence to real market prices in Algeria is a key criterion to prevent deception.
Choisissez le produit ci-dessous, lisez: Choose the product below, read and sign our listed commitment terms.
Si plusieurs vendeurs sponsorisent des p: If multiple sellers sponsor products in the same category, they rotate fairly to ensure similar sales opportunities for everyone.
Tous les produits sponsorisés approuvés: All approved sponsored products are prioritized and displayed
Vos produits reçoivent le badge lumineux: Your products receive the highlighted badge
Comprendre notre algorithme de mise en a: Understanding our promotion algorithm and approval process
Boostez vos ventes en plaçant vos produi: Boost your sales by placing your products at the top of the list on OLMART.

et remettra votre compte en attente de v: and will place your account back on pending verification.
